name: Update Employee Contact Details
description:
As an ESS user (employee)
  I want to edit my contact information in the HRMS application
  So that my contact details remain current and accurate

steps.name: user is on the login page
user enters a valid username and password
user is successfully navigated to the dashboard
user is on the login page
user enters valid username and wrong password
error message "Invalid credentials" should be displayed
user is on the login page
user enters a correct username and empty password
error message "Required" should be displayed
user is on the login page
user enters empty username and valid password
error message "Required" should be displayed
user is on the login page
user enters empty username and empty password
multiple required error messages should be displayed

elements.name: User retries login after invalid credentials

embeddings.name: User retries login after invalid credentials

steps.name: user is on the login page
user enters valid username and wrong password

user remains on login page

name: Login Error Validation
description:
As a system user
  I want to log in with valid and invalid credentials
  So that I can validate login functionality

the profile picture should be uploaded successfully
the uploaded image should be displayed on the profile.
